posts.text:
BREAKING: President Trump responds to reports that Iran is preparing to impose tolls on vessels transiting the Strait of Hormuz in 60 days.

“There will be no tolls in the Hormuz Strait for 60 days during the cease fire period, and there will be no tolls after the 60 day period has expired, unless they are imposed by and for the US,” he says.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter
